name: Safety-Environment Trade-off Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Enhanced safety features increase construction and maintenance costs → Systemic: Reduced domestic feel lowers participant retention by 15–20% (based on preliminary behavioral studies) → Strategic: Compromises longitudinal data continuity by prioritizing risk mitigation over ecological validity. Controls clinical safety vs. behavioral authenticity. Weakness: The options fail to consider long-term participant adaptation to modified environments.
options: Install standard medical-grade safety barriers and alarms without architectural modifications
Adopt modular safety systems that can be retracted during daytime hours to preserve domestic aesthetics
Deploy AI-driven predictive analytics to dynamically adjust safety protocols based on real-time behavioral patterns
review: Controls clinical safety vs. behavioral authenticity. Weakness: The options fail to consider long-term participant adaptation to modified environments.

name: Data Acquisition Optimization Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Tiered monitoring reduces sensor redundancy but increases data integration complexity → Systemic: 30% higher false positives in event triage due to fragmented signal correlation → Strategic: Delays algorithm development by requiring manual cross-validation between modalities. Controls technical precision vs. operational efficiency. Weakness: The options fail to consider signal synchronization latency in multi-modal data streams.
options: Maintain current tiered monitoring with manual data fusion by technicians
Implement standardized cross-modal calibration protocols every 72 hours to reduce integration friction
Adopt quantum sensor networking for real-time multi-modal synchronization with adaptive sampling rates
review: Controls technical precision vs. operational efficiency. Weakness: The options fail to consider signal synchronization latency in multi-modal data streams.

name: Participant Recruitment Strategy

review: Controls clinical rigor vs. demographic diversity. Weakness: The options fail to consider socioeconomic barriers to participation in rural Bonn.
